ques: Find the no. 1 weekly charts ranked artist based on Billboard and tell me 10 most played song by this artist until now.
answer: Billboard's #1 weekly-ranked artist (Artist 100, week of June 27, 2026) is Olivia Rodrigo. Her 10 most-played songs to date (by total Spotify streams): 1) drivers license 2) good 4 u 3) traitor 4) deja vu 5) vampire 6) happier 7) favorite crime 8) jealousy, jealousy 9) All I Want (From "HSMTMTS") 10) brutal.
